schema_name: Saudi PDPL Cross-Border Review Input Schema
description: Hybrid input schema for policy-based review of Saudi PDPL transfer scenarios, privacy policy and rights readiness, processor governance, approved safeguards, and risk-assessment obligations.

current_region.description: Current region or hosting location where the dataset is stored or processed.

encryption_at_rest.description: Whether encryption at rest is enabled for the target dataset or resource.

contains_sensitive_data.description: Whether the dataset appears to contain sensitive personal data.

uses_processor.description: Whether a processor or hosted service provider is involved in the transfer path.

access_control_in_place.description: Whether baseline access control is configured.

dataset_name.description: Human-readable name of the dataset being evaluated.

data_subject_connection.description: Connection of the data subject or processing context to the Kingdom.

processing_purpose_defined.description: Whether the processing purpose is clearly defined and documented.

data_minimized.description: Whether only the minimum personal data necessary for the transfer is used.

retention_period_defined.description: Whether retention or deletion period is documented.

processing_legal_basis.description: Primary Saudi PDPL legal basis or exception relied on for processing.

explicit_consent_for_sensitive_data.description: Whether explicit consent is documented when sensitive data is processed on a consent basis.

privacy_policy_available.description: Whether a controller privacy policy is published or otherwise made available as required.

data_subject_rights_request_ready.description: Whether workflows exist to respond to access, copy, correction, destruction, and other rights requests.

consent_withdrawal_process_ready.description: Whether a practical consent withdrawal process exists when consent is the legal basis.

data_accuracy_review_completed.description: Whether personal data accuracy, completeness, and update controls were reviewed.

privacy_notice_available.description: Whether the required privacy notice information is available to the data subject.

cross_border_notice_provided.description: Whether cross-border transfer information is disclosed where relevant.

target_region.description: Target region or hosting location selected for storage or transfer.

adequate_protection_confirmed.description: Whether an officially recognized adequate level of protection or equivalent approved basis has been confirmed for the destination.

binding_common_rules_approved.description: Whether approved binding common rules are available for the transfer.

standard_contractual_clauses_in_place.description: Whether Saudi-recognized standard contractual clauses or equivalent approved clauses are in place.

certification_or_code_in_place.description: Whether an approved certification or binding code of conduct is in place for the transfer.

transfer_exception_used.description: Whether a narrow transfer exception is relied on instead of adequate protection or safeguards.

transfer_exception_type.description: Specific transfer exception type if an exception path is used.

transfer_risk_assessment_completed.description: Whether the transfer risk assessment required under the transfer regulation was completed.

large_scale_or_continuous_transfer.description: Whether the transfer is continuous or large-scale, especially for sensitive data.

processor_agreement_in_place.description: Whether a processor agreement or equivalent written terms are in place.

processor_compliance_verified.description: Whether processor compliance and guarantees were verified by the controller.

subprocessor_or_onward_transfer_controls.description: Whether onward transfer and subprocessor controls are contractually addressed.

records_of_processing_exists.description: Whether records of processing activities exist.

dpo_required.description: Whether the scenario indicates a DPO appointment obligation.

dpo_assigned.description: Whether the required DPO or responsible privacy contact has been assigned.

processing_impact_assessment_completed.description: Whether an internal processing impact assessment or similar review was completed for the activity.

breach_response_72h_ready.description: Whether breach handling and 72-hour notification readiness is documented.

target_country_known.description: Whether target_region could be mapped to a country code.

transfer_outside_kingdom.description: Whether the transfer destination is outside Saudi Arabia.

appropriate_safeguards_available.description: Whether binding common rules, standard contractual clauses, or certification/code safeguards are present.

baseline_security_controls_ready.description: Whether encryption at rest, encryption in transit, and access control are all confirmed.

transfer_risk_assessment_required.description: Whether a transfer risk assessment should have been completed under the transfer regulation.
